metadata.title: Burning Love
metadata.lyrics:
[00:06.94] Lord Almighty, I feel my temperature risin', mmm
[00:13.58] Higher, higher, it's burning through to my soul
[00:20.25] Girl, girl, girl, girl, you're gonna set me on fire
[00:26.73] My brain is flamin', I don't know which way to go, yeah
[00:33.33] Your kisses lift me higher
[00:36.59] Like a sweet song of a choir
[00:40.15] You light my mornin' sky with burning love, mmm
[00:47.05] Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh, I feel my temperature risin', mm
[00:53.58] Help me, I'm flamin', I must be a 109, mmm
[01:00.43] Burnin', burnin', burnin' and nothing can cool me, yeah
[01:07.01] I just might turn into smoke, but I feel fine
[01:13.31] 'Cause your kisses lift me higher
[01:16.54] Like the sweet song of a choir
[01:19.97] And you light my mornin' sky with burning love
[01:27.02] (Ah-ah-ah)
[01:30.32] (Ah-ah-ah)
[01:33.63] (Ah-ah-ah, with burning love)
[01:40.32] It's comin' closer, the flames are now lickin' my body, mm
[01:47.07] Won't you help me? I feel like I'm slippin' away
[01:53.52] It's hard to breathe, and my chest is a-heavin', mmm, hmm
[02:00.23] Lord, have mercy, I'm burning a hole where I lay, yeah
[02:06.83] Your kisses lift me higher
[02:10.08] Like the sweet song of a choir
[02:13.55] You light my morning sky with burning love
[02:19.39] With burning love (a hunk, a hunk of burning love, ah)
[02:23.15] I'm just a hunk, a hunk of burning love (ah)
[02:26.50] I'm just a hunk, a hunk of burning love, ah (ah)
[02:30.27] A hunk, a hunk of burning love, ah (ah)
[02:33.48] A hunk, a hunk of burning love, ah (ah)
[02:36.88] A hunk, a hunk of burning love (ah)
[02:39.91] Just a hunk, a hunk of burning love, ah (ah)
[02:43.53] A hunk, a hunk of burning love, ah, ah (ah)
[02:46.38] I'm just a hunk, a hunk of burning love
[02:46.65]
